global.description: The ad features a dark background with a prominent logo and clear call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting new content availability on BingeLayer.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A dark, solid background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for other elements.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: A prominent logo at the top center, featuring the text 'BingeLayer' in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Various abstract shapes in the top area, adding visual interest without specific identifiable features.

elements.label: new season announcement
elements.description: Text in the center that reads 'A new season drops', styled in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: weekly hits message
elements.description: Text below the main announcement stating 'New hits every week', designed to attract viewer attention.

elements.label: small decorative icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned at the top left, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center with the text 'Book now', designed to encourage user action.

elements.label: small circular icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon located near the bottom, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: A small rectangular element in the center, unclear in purpose or content.

elements.label: BingeLayer headline
elements.description: The main headline at the top, prominently displaying the brand name 'BingeLayer' in a bold font.

elements.label: season drops message
elements.description: Text at the bottom stating 'A new season drops New hits every week', designed to inform viewers.
elements.text_content: A new season drops New hits every week

elements.label: Book now call to action
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button at the bottom with the text 'Book now', inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, followed by body text in the middle, and the CTA button at the bottom.
